gazette: Ministry of Trade, Center for Technical Barriers to Trade Information and Notification
title: Announcement Regarding "Importer Declaration Form" for Export to Saudi Arabia.
bodyHtml:
The Saudi Arabian Standards Organization (SASO) has issued a circular to SASO-approved Conformity Assessment Bodies (CABs) stating that, starting from May 10, 2023, prior approval from the Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources of Saudi Arabia is required for exports of ceramic tiles, other paints and varnishes, carpets, rugs, and carpet flex products.

Furthermore, in a new circular sent to SASO-approved CABs, it is stated that in addition to the aforementioned products, for products (iron and steel) with the HS codes listed below, the Importer Declaration Form must be uploaded to the SABER electronic system by the CABs along with the approval obtained from the Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources. The circular emphasizes that this practice started on May 10, 2023, and shipment certificates cannot be issued without the mentioned document.

HS codes: 72104900; 72103000; 72107000; 72141000; 71163320; 72142040

Click here to access the relevant circulars.
